_meta.voice: Direct American English. Legal expert and educator voice: authoritative, precise, no hype. Former high-court judge positioning. Bilingual UA + EN site — case-study copy is Code-Site's external pitch.

strings.2 мовні версії · 1 адмін-панель · 5+ роз: 2 language versions · 1 easy admin panel · 5+ main sections · 3 tracks: courses, services, publications
strings.CTA для заявок на консультацію або навча: CTAs for consultation or course inquiries
strings.SEO-пропрацювання сторінок під юридичні: SEO tuning on pages for legal and education queries
strings.Адаптивну версію для мобільних пристроїв: A responsive build for mobile devices
strings.Анімації для сучаснішої подачі: Animations for a more modern presentation
strings.Дати короткий шлях від інтересу до заявк: Give a short path from interest to a consultation or course inquiry
strings.Додати адмінку для самостійного оновленн: Add an admin panel for self-serve content updates without a developer
strings.За 6 місяців після запуску сайту я отрим: Six months after launch I got more clients than in the previous two years combined. The separate course funnel became a business of its own.
strings.Закласти SEO-структуру під юридичні та о: Lay an SEO structure for legal and education queries
strings.Змінювати зображення та додавати нові фо: Swap images and add new photos
strings.Зручну адмін-панель Sanity CMS: A Sanity CMS admin panel that's easy to run
strings.Керувати послугами, курсами, статтями, п: Manage services, courses, articles, publications, and reviews
strings.Керувати тільки потрібними розділами без: Edit only the sections you need without risking the site's design
strings.Колишній суддя високої інстанції, адвока: Former high-court judge, attorney, and educator
strings.Ми налаштували адмін-панель Sanity CMS,: We set the client up with a Sanity CMS admin panel they can run themselves without constantly reaching out to a developer. The interface works on a phone, so changes happen fast: update copy, add an article or course, or reorder blocks.
strings.Ми побудували сайт навколо персонального: We built the site around Oleksandr Sytnykov's personal brand: his experience, status, legal expertise, and training programs. Every block does one job: show authority, explain services and courses, and drive the user to an inquiry.
strings.Можливість додавати нові статті та курси: Ability to add new articles and courses
strings.Олександр Ситников — колишній суддя висо: Oleksandr Sytnykov is a former high-court judge, attorney, and educator who runs training programs for lawyers and advocates. We built a personal-brand site that underscores his professional standing, presents his advocacy courses, and helps users reach an inquiry fast.
strings.Олександр Ситников — сайт для юридичного: Oleksandr Sytnykov — site for a legal expert and *advocacy courses*
strings.Олександр Ситников отримав сайт, який пр: Oleksandr Sytnykov got a site that works as a personal-brand platform, legal-services hub, and advocacy-courses storefront.
strings.Персональний бренд колишнього судді: кур: Personal brand for a former judge: courses, services, publications, 2 languages, Sanity CMS, and SEO for legal and education queries.
strings.Працювати з адмінкою навіть з телефону: Run the admin even from a phone
strings.Презентувати адвокатські курси як експер: Present advocacy courses as an expert product, not a footnote on a bio page
strings.Реалізувати 2 мовні версії сайту з корек: Ship 2 language versions with a sound SEO architecture
strings.Редагувати SEO-поля для сторінок: Edit SEO fields on every page
strings.Сайт підкреслює його статус колишнього с: The site underscores his standing as a former judge, shows his expertise, presents the training programs, and drives users to an inquiry. The bilingual structure and SEO lay the groundwork for organic growth on legal and education queries.
strings.Сторінки для досвіду, послуг, курсів, пу: Pages for experience, services, courses, publications, and contact
strings.Структуру сайту під юридичну нішу та пер: Site structure tuned to the legal niche and personal brand
strings.Структурувати послуги, публікації та нав: Structure services, publications, and learning materials in one logic
strings.У цьому проєкті потрібно було продати не: This project wasn't about selling legal services alone — it was about selling trust in an expert with a strong professional background. Clients and students weigh experience, status, and how content is organized before the first inquiry. Without the right architecture, even a strong practitioner stays invisible in search.
strings.Олександр Ситников — сайт юридичного екс: Oleksandr Sytnykov — legal expert & advocacy courses site | Code-Site.Art

sections[_key==\"sec6\"].bodyEn: This project wasn't about selling legal services alone — it was about selling trust in an expert with a strong professional background. Clients and students weigh experience, status, and how content is organized before the first inquiry. Without the right architecture, even a strong practitioner stays invisible in search.
sections[_key==\"sec9\"].bodyEn: We built the site around Oleksandr Sytnykov's personal brand: his experience, status, legal expertise, and training programs. Every block does one job: show authority, explain services and courses, and drive the user to an inquiry.
sections[_key==\"fd187ec9f59b\"].bodyEn:
We set the client up with a Sanity CMS admin panel they can run themselves without constantly reaching out to a developer. The interface works on a phone, so changes happen fast: update copy, add an article or course, or reorder blocks.

In the admin you can:
sections[_key==\"sech\"].bodyEn: Oleksandr Sytnykov got a site that works as a personal-brand platform, legal-services hub, and advocacy-courses storefront. The site underscores his standing as a former judge, shows his expertise, presents the training programs, and drives users to an inquiry. The bilingual structure and SEO lay the groundwork for organic growth on legal and education queries.
